alias: HVAC - AC Overrides: Auto-Off on Heat Season
description: When hvac_season changes to Heat, force both office_ac and master_bedroom_ac off. The AC and heat cannot run together on these mini-splits (single inverter). Turning the booleans off cascades into hvac_*_ac_off, which is a no-op in Heat season (Heat branch has no AC actions). Also re-runs hvac_apply_mode so the room state catches up to the new season (required now that Apply Mode has no triggers of its own — see "Apply Mode entry points" in hvac-design.md).
